mapper.select:
select
from cer_vector_task_tb where id in(select distinct vector_task_id from cer_plasmid_quality_tb) and sub_project_id = #{subProjectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} order by id desc

select distinct species_code from cer_vector_task_tb where task_status = '2' and id in(select distinct vector_task_id from cer_transform_tb) and project_id in (select id from cer_project_tb where project_status = 'execute')

select
from cer_vector_task_tb where task_status = '2' and project_id in(select id from cer_project_tb where project_status ='execute') and id not in(select vector_task_id from cer_plasmid_quality_tb) and id in(select vector_task_id from cer_vector_tb ) and sub_project_id = #{subProjectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} order by id desc

select
from cer_vector_task_tb where id in(select distinct vector_task_id from cer_transform_tb) and project_id in(select id from cer_project_tb where project_status ='execute') and task_status = '2' order by id desc

select
from cer_vector_task_tb where id in(select distinct vector_task_id from cer_transform_tb) and project_id in(select id from cer_project_tb where project_status ='execute') and species_code = #{speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and task_status = '2' order by id desc
